title: onosma dichroantha
intro: Onosma dichroantha is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Onosma dichroantha can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and relieve coughs.
